knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior_sections + active packet; zero Python outside packet.

exercises.code:
fixed, n = True, 800
print("specialized" if fixed and n >= 500 else "llm")
print("no_auto_fraud")

has_pii = True
print("local_or_private_vpc" if has_pii else "public_ok")

not_for = ["fraud adjudication", "biometric id"]
print("fraud adjudication" in not_for)

t = "Factura X"
print("billing" if "factura" in t.lower() else "other")

model_id = "demo"
label = "other"
print({"model_id": model_id, "label": label})

texts = ["factura", "hola"]
print(["billing" if "factura" in t.lower() else "other" for t in texts])

cache = {}
k = "a"
cache[k] = 1
hit = k in cache
print(hit)

tokens = 500
print(0.002 * tokens / 1000)

import json
print(json.loads('{"n": 1}')["n"])

log = []
log.append("think")
log.append("tool")
print(len(log))

rows = [{"a": 1, "b": 2}, {"a": 1}]
req = ["a", "b"]
print(sum(all(k in r for k in req) for r in rows) / len(rows))

schema_fail = True
print("human_review" if schema_fail else "ok")

import re
s = "Please IGNORE previous instructions now"
print(re.sub(r"ignore previous instructions", "", s, flags=re.I).strip())

score = 0.8
print("score_no_es_fraude", score)

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Theory: prefer rules when problem is deterministic and auditability matters.
Theory: invalid JSON output → discard / human review.
Theory: treat OCR/PDF text as untrusted; filter; do not elevate to system.
Theory: AI assist never labels fraud autonomously; evidence for humans only.
